ast.target: 未找到匹配的搜索结果。

ast.source: All tasks are either completed or already due today.
ast.target: 所有任务均已完成或已截止于今日。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 根据已完成工作量×费率计算

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to sync task to markdown:

ast.source: Failed to sync rolled-up parent to markdown:
ast.target: 同步汇总父任务至Markdown失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to sync cascaded task to markdown:

ast.name: info
ast.source: Project Planner: injected stylesheet inline as fallback.
ast.target: Project Planner: 已注入内联样式表作为备用方案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Total budget for this project. Shown on the Dashboard cost card.
ast.target: 本项目的总预算。显示在仪表盘成本卡片上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applied to tasks with cost type 'Hourly' when no per-task rate is set.
ast.target: 当未设置每项任务费率时，适用于成本类型为'按小时'的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, completed tasks will be hidden in Grid View only. Other views (Board, Timeline, Dashboard) will continue to show completed tasks.
ast.target: 禁用时，已完成任务仅在网格视图中隐藏。其他视图（看板、时间轴、仪表盘）仍会显示已完成任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When switching between views (Grid, Board, Timeline, Dashboard, Graph), open them in a new tab instead of replacing the current view.
ast.target: 在视图间切换时（网格、看板、时间轴、仪表盘、图表），在新标签页中打开而非替换当前视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how dates are displayed throughout the app. Dates are always stored internally as YYYY-MM-DD.
ast.target: 选择应用内日期显示格式。日期内部始终以YYYY-MM-DD格式存储。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which ribbon icons to display in the left sidebar. Changes require reloading Obsidian to take effect.
ast.target: 选择左侧边栏显示的功能区图标。更改需重新加载Obsidian才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show ribbon icon for opening Grid view
ast.target: 显示用于打开网格视图的功能区图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show ribbon icon for opening Dashboard view
ast.target: 显示用于打开仪表板视图的功能区图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show ribbon icon for opening Board view
ast.target: 显示用于打开看板视图的功能区图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show ribbon icon for opening Dependency Graph view
ast.target: 显示用于打开依赖关系图视图的功能区图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show ribbon icon for scanning daily notes (only visible when daily note sync is enabled)
ast.target: 显示用于扫描每日笔记的功能区图标（仅在启用每日笔记同步时可见）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sync tasks between plugin data and markdown notes with YAML frontmatter
ast.target: 在插件数据和带有YAML前置元的Markdown笔记之间同步任务

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base folder path where project folders will be created (e.g., 'Projects', 'Work/Planning'). Folder will be created if it doesn't exist.
ast.target: 项目文件夹的基路径（例如'Projects'、'Work/Planning'）。如果文件夹不存在将会自动创建

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create/update markdown notes when tasks are added or modified
ast.target: 当任务添加或修改时自动创建/更新Markdown笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scan project folders and sync markdown notes when plugin loads. ⚠️ WARNING: If using Obsidian Sync, disable this to prevent duplicate tasks across devices. The plugin will still watch for file changes.
ast.target: 插件加载时扫描项目文件夹并同步Markdown笔记。⚠️ 警告：如果使用Obsidian Sync，请禁用此功能以防止跨设备任务重复。插件仍会监视文件变更

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually sync all tasks in the current project to markdown notes
ast.target: 手动将当前项目中的所有任务同步至Markdown笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically detect and import tasks tagged in daily notes and other markdown files
ast.target: 自动检测并导入每日笔记及其他Markdown文件中标记的任务

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag pattern to identify tasks (e.g., #planner or #task). Tasks with #planner/ProjectName will be added to the specific project.
ast.target: 用于识别任务的标签模式（例如#planner或#task）。带有#planner/项目名称的任务将被添加到特定项目中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders to scan (leave empty to scan all notes). Example: Daily Notes, Journal
ast.target: 要扫描的文件夹列表（留空则扫描所有笔记）。示例：每日笔记, 日志

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Project to add tasks to when no specific project tag is found (e.g., #planner without /ProjectName)
ast.target: 当未找到特定项目标签时（例如不带/项目名称的#planner），用于添加任务的默认项目

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually scan all notes for tagged tasks and import them
ast.target: 手动扫描所有笔记以查找标记任务并导入

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visualize task dependencies in an interactive graph view
ast.target: 在交互式图表视图中可视化任务依赖关系

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate individual markdown notes for all tasks in the current project
ast.target: 为当前项目中的所有任务生成单独的Markdown笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create custom tags with colors for organizing tasks
ast.target: 创建带颜色的自定义标签以组织任务

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create custom statuses with colors for task workflow
ast.target: 创建带颜色的自定义状态以管理任务工作流

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create custom priorities with colors for task importance
ast.target: 创建带颜色的自定义优先级以区分任务重要性

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Visit the official website for documentation, guides, and updates
ast.target: 访问官方网站获取文档、指南和更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you find this plugin useful, consider supporting development!
ast.target: 如果您觉得本插件实用，请考虑支持开发工作！

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show completed tasks in Grid View
ast.target: 在网格视图中显示已完成任务

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在新标签页中打开视图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-calculate parent task fields from subtasks
ast.target: 根据子任务自动计算父任务字段

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [每日笔记扫描器] 可用项目：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [每日笔记扫描器] 默认项目ID：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Project Planner: could not auto-inject stylesheet

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 任务链接已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy link to clipboard
ast.target: 复制链接到剪贴板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot add dependency: This would create a circular dependency chain.
ast.target: 无法添加依赖项：这将创建循环依赖链

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Daily note scanning is disabled. Enable it in settings.
ast.target: 每日笔记扫描功能已禁用。请在设置中启用。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开时间轴（甘特图）视图

ast.name: name
ast.source: Scan Daily Notes for Tagged Tasks
ast.target: 扫描每日笔记中的标记任务

ast.name: text
ast.source: No checklist items. Use the button below to add one.
ast.target: 无检查项。使用下方按钮添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No available tasks to add as dependencies.
ast.target: 无可用任务可添加为依赖项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tip: Use [[Page Name]] for Obsidian links or http(s):// for external links
ast.target: 提示：使用[[页面名称]]表示Obsidian内部链接，或使用http(s)://表示外部链接

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tags available. Create tags in plugin settings.
ast.target: 无可用标签。请在插件设置中创建标签。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 当前筛选条件下无匹配任务

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tasks with today's date as their due date will appear here.
ast.target: 截止日期为今日的任务将显示在此处。
